portal.welcome:
👋 Welcome to LingoDesk — chat with the whole world in your native language on Telegram.

Activation takes just three steps (illustrated guide: lingodesk.org/setup/):
1️⃣ Create your own bot in @BotFather (/newbot), then in Bot Settings enable Secretary Mode (formerly Business Mode) and turn off Group Privacy
2️⃣ Send me the token you get (looks like 123456:ABC...) and I'll activate you instantly
3️⃣ Follow the reply to bind Telegram Business (remember to enable the "Reply to messages" permission), create a console group and send /bind

Send me your bot token from @BotFather to activate. Full guide: lingodesk.org/setup/

💡 It works both ways: when someone messages you a topic pops up automatically; you can also proactively message anyone from your personal account and they'll appear in the console, then keep chatting here in your native language.

Other commands: /status to check status · /native <code> to set your native language (default Chinese)
portal.business_mode_fix:
⚠️ Detected that your bot hasn't enabled Secretary Mode (formerly Business Mode) yet — when binding, Telegram will say "This bot does not support Telegram Business yet".

The fix takes only 20 seconds, done in @BotFather (either interface works):
① Classic command version: /mybots → pick your bot → Bot Settings → Secretary Mode → Turn on
② New panel: tap the blue Open button next to the BotFather input box → pick your bot → Settings → Mode Settings → toggle Secretary Mode on

(The name differs across clients: Secretary Mode = Business Mode, finding either is fine; it's unrelated to Telegram Premium, anyone can enable it.) It takes effect immediately, no need to resend the token; once done go to Settings → Telegram Business → Chatbots to add it again. Send /status to re-check.
portal.plan_free: Plan: Free · {used}/{quota} outbound this month (send /subscribe to upgrade to Pro for unlimited)
portal.subscribe_not_activated: Activate before subscribing 🙂 Send me the bot token you created in @BotFather, or send /start for the guide.
portal.subscribe_already_pro: You're already Pro ⭐ Unlimited translation quota. Send /status to see your renewal date, /paysupport to manage your subscription.
portal.subscribe_invoice_fail: Failed to generate the subscription invoice. Try again later or send /paysupport to contact us.
portal.status_not_activated: You haven't activated yet. Just send me the bot token you got from @BotFather, or send /start for the guide.
portal.not_activated_short: You haven't activated yet. Send me your bot token first.
portal.status_biz_off: ❌ Off → BotFather → /mybots → Bot Settings → Secretary Mode (formerly Business Mode) → Turn on
portal.status_conn_off: ❌ Go to Settings → Telegram Business → Chatbots to bind your bot
portal.status_reply_off: ❌ In Chatbots select your bot → enable "Reply to messages" (without it you can receive but not send)
portal.status_forum_off: ❌ Create a group, add your bot, and send /bind in it
portal.native_usage: Usage: /native <ISO639-1 code>, e.g. /native zh (Chinese), /native en (English). Customer messages will be translated into this language.
portal.native_set: ✅ Native language set to {lang}; customer messages will be translated into it from now on.
portal.bind_in_group:
"/bind" should be sent in your console group, not to me 🙂

Order: create a group → enable "Topics" in group settings → add your bot @{bot} and make it an admin (check "Manage Topics") → send /bind in that group.
Send /status to see which step you're stuck on.
portal.bind_not_activated: You haven't activated yet 🙂 First send me the bot token you created in @BotFather, or send /start for the full guide.
portal.enable_ok: ▶️ Tried to restore your instance, send /status to check.
portal.token_invalid:
❌ This token failed validation (format is right but Telegram rejects it). Go to @BotFather → /mybots → API Token and copy it again.
(the original message has been deleted)
portal.token_clash: ❌ This bot has already been registered by another account. If it's really yours, first Revoke the token in @BotFather to reset it, then submit the new one.
portal.activated:
🎉 Activated! Your translation relay @{bot} is now running in the cloud. (I've deleted the token message you sent)

Two steps left (do them on your phone, illustrated version: lingodesk.org/setup/):
1️⃣ Settings → Telegram Business → Chatbots → bind @{bot}, enable the "Reply to messages" permission
2️⃣ Create a group, enable "Topics", add @{bot} as an admin (check "Manage Topics"), and send /bind in the group

Once done, have anyone message you in a foreign language to test one, and a bilingual card will pop into the group. /status to check progress anytime.
portal.fallback_billing: Didn't get that 🙂 Send /start for the activation guide; /status to check status; /subscribe to upgrade to Pro.
portal.fallback_nobilling: Didn't get that 🙂 Send /start for the activation guide; after activating send /status to check status.
billing.invoice_desc: Unlimited translation quota + unlimited contacts + priority support. Auto-renews monthly, cancel anytime.
billing.pay_no_tenant: Payment received, but I couldn't find your tenant profile yet 🤔 Send a bot token to activate first; send /paysupport if you need help.
billing.pay_renewed: ✅ LingoDesk Pro auto-renewed, thanks for your support!
billing.pay_upgraded: 🎉 Upgraded to LingoDesk Pro! Translation quota is now unlimited, auto-renews monthly. To cancel, anytime go to Telegram Settings → My Stars.
billing.paysupport:
💬 LingoDesk Pro · Payment support

· View / cancel subscription: Telegram → Settings → My Stars → find the LingoDesk subscription, cancel anytime (stays active until the end of the current period, then stops renewing).
· Refunds, billing issues or other questions: email hello@lingodesk.org with your @username and we'll handle it promptly.
· Send /status to see your current plan and this month's usage.
relay.bind_ok:
✅ This group is now bound as your LingoDesk console.
When customers privately message your personal account, a dedicated topic and bilingual card will pop up here automatically; reply in your native language right in the topic.
relay.bind_owner_only: Only the account that bound this bot can use /bind.
relay.bind_need_topics: Please enable "Topics" in the group settings first, then send /bind in the group.
relay.reply_perm_warn:
⚠️ Detected that you've bound the bot but haven't enabled the "Reply to messages" permission — you can receive translations now, but tapping "Send to customer" will fail.

Fix: Settings → Telegram Business → Chatbots → select your bot → enable the "Reply to messages" permission.
It takes effect immediately once enabled; go back to the topic and tap send again.
relay.card_footer: ↳ Type in your language in this topic; it's auto-translated to {lang} and sent as you
relay.owner_initiated: 📤 You reached out to {name} — topic created. Type in your language here to keep chatting with them (auto-translated to their language; their language defaults to English, fix with /lang).
relay.translate_fail:
⚠️ Translation temporarily failed. Customer's original (please handle manually):
{text}
relay.no_conn_file: ⚠️ No business_connection yet. Reconnect via Telegram Business → Chatbots.
relay.file_send_fail: ⚠️ Failed to send file, please try again later.
relay.lang_set: ✅ Set {name}'s language to {code}; future outbound will be translated accordingly.
relay.help:
Topic commands:
/lang <code> — manually correct the customer's language (e.g. /lang es)
/bind — bind a group as the console
Just type in your native language = translation preview then send to customer
relay.unknown_cmd: Unknown command, send /help to see options.
relay.no_conn_text: ⚠️ business_connection not captured yet. Trigger it by reconnecting via Telegram Business → Chatbots.
relay.preview_expired: This preview has expired (the service may have restarted), please type again.
relay.quota_full:
🈵 This month's free quota is used up ({quota} translated replies per month). Upgrade to Pro for unlimited — monthly subscription {price} ⭐, cancel anytime.
Your draft has been kept; after upgrading come back and tap "Send to customer" again.
relay.cb_no_conn: No business_connection yet, reconnect via Chatbots.
relay.tip_generic: Failed to send, try again later.
relay.tip_peer_invalid: Send rejected: most likely the "Reply to messages" permission isn't enabled. Go to Settings → Telegram Business → Chatbots → your bot → enable "Reply to messages"; also check whether this customer is within the bot's accessible chat scope. After fixing, tap send again — your draft has been kept.
relay.tip_peer_usage: This customer hasn't interacted in over 24 hours, and Telegram won't let the bot initiate (an anti-abuse hard rule). Have them send a message first, or reply manually this time. Your draft has been kept.
relay.tip_conn_invalid: Business connection is invalid; have the customer send a message to refresh, or reconnect via Chatbots. Your draft has been kept.
manager.notify_token_invalid: ⚠️ Your bot token is no longer valid (it may have been reset in BotFather). Service is paused — send me a new token to resume.
manager.notify_conflict: ⚠️ Your bot is running somewhere else too (e.g. a copy you self-hosted). One token can only run one instance globally. The cloud instance is paused; stop your other copy, then send /enable.
